channel.title: AXP — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on AXP (American Express) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Bill Nygren: TRIMMED AXP (-10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) trimmed AXP in Q4 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED AXP (+41%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added AXP in Q1 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Bill Nygren: TRIMMED AXP (-9%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) trimmed AXP in Q1 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.
